name: Paupers Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon, onion, and carrot in a saucepan over a moderate flame for 5 minutes.
2. Remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Sauté the chicken and sausage until well browned.
4. Transfer to a food processor with a slotted spoon.
5. Add 3 tablespoons of pan drippings, discarding the remainder of the pan drippings.
6. Add the remaining ingredients and process until nearly smooth.
7. Pack into a plastic-lined mold.
8. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours.
9. Invert onto a serving platter.
10. Remove and discard the plastic wrap.
11. Serve at room temperature with assorted crackers or cocktail breads on the side.
